summary: Validated 'Limpar Cadastros' bug fix end-to-end. Notice.js modal library now loads correctly. All specified scenarios PASS: (1) admin login via UI at /donaspainel/ works with donas/Seinao10@@; (2) 2 cadastros seeded via POST /api/track/registration (Maria/11144477735, Joao/22233344455) show up in /admin/cadastros with total=2 and in the UI counter '2 cadastros'; (3) Clicking data-testid='btn-limpar-cadastros' opens confirmation modal with exact title 'Limpar todos os cadastros?', expected message, buttons 'Sim, limpar tudo' and 'Cancelar'; (4) Cancel path: clicking Cancelar closes modal and preserves data (total still 2 via API); (5) Confirm path: clicking 'Sim, limpar tudo' triggers DELETE /admin/cadastros, backend responds ok, IdecanNotice success modal appears ('Limpeza concluída' / '2 cadastro(s) removido(s) com sucesso. A página será recarregada.'), page reloads, total==0 verified via GET /api/admin/cadastros and UI shows '0 candidatos'.
critical_code_review_comments: notice.js correctly guards against double-init with `if (window.IdecanConfirm && window.IdecanNotice) return;` and injects a scoped style tag with idn-* classes — no CSS bleed.
admin-extras.js ensureNoticeLib dynamically loads /assets/notice.js and only proceeds after onload — safe against missing lib race.
DELETE /admin/cadastros handler is aliased to POST /admin/cadastros/clear-all as a proxy-fallback path in the frontend (r.status in [404,405,501,502,503]) — resilient design.
Modal backdrop uses z-index 2147483000 which is above all in-app modals; good.
Minor UX: after clicking 'OK' on success notice, location.reload() is used — this works but loses scroll/state. Not a bug.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 cadastros via POST /api/track/registration (Maria Teste Silva/11144477735, Joao Teste Souza/22233344455); both were cleared during the confirm-path test; cadastros collection is empty at end of run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Limpar Cadastros bug fully fixed. Confirmation modal + success notice work via /assets/notice.js (IdecanConfirm / IdecanNotice). Button injected by admin-extras.js MutationObserver ~1s after entering #/cadastro. Admin login inputs have data-testid=admin-login-username / admin-login-password. Token stored in localStorage under 'donas_admin_token'.
rca of the issue: Original root cause was correctly identified: /assets/notice.js file was missing, so window.IdecanConfirm was undefined and the click handler stopped before showing a modal or firing the DELETE. Fix (creation of /app/frontend/public/assets/notice.js providing IdecanConfirm/IdecanNotice as promise-returning modal helpers with matching CSS) fully resolves the issue.
